status_notes: New initiative launched ~June 2026; membership and scope may still change.
notes: Linux Foundation initiative to defend critical open-source software against AI-enabled cyber threats. Operates a single shared Security Incident Response Team (SIRT) running a standardized Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure (CVD) process. 19 founding members (AWS, Anthropic, Google, Microsoft/GitHub, Red Hat, and others); seed funding via the Linux Foundation's Alpha-Omega fund. See also the disclosure program record: secid:disclosure/akrites.org.

match_nodes.description: Akrites — Linux Foundation open-source vulnerability coordination initiative

data.description: Multi-organization Linux Foundation initiative operating a shared SIRT and standardized CVD process for critical open-source software.
